creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Your GPU requires a much more recent DRM than we have in the FreeBSD kernel. It even requires a brand new driver called "amdgpu".

There is work in progress to update our DRM and port amdgpu. Expect something to test in July or August hopefully. Follow the freebsd-x11@ mailing-list for more news on that.
